◎简　　介  

　　All the President’s Men Revisited brings Watergate to life with riveting archival footage, shocking Oval Office recordings, and compelling new interviews with those who perpetuated the crimes, those who pursued them, and those who portrayed them. The presentation unravels the story that began with a “third-rate burglary attempt” and escalated into the first and only Presidentia...
